name: Just Smoke & Things BBQ
headline: BBQ Food Truck · Winter Haven, FL
description: Good Food. Big Flavor. Smoked to Perfection. Serving the best BBQ in Winter Haven every Thursday, Friday and Saturday.
address: 2439 Lucerne Park Rd, Winter Haven, FL · Big Open Field Next to the Gas Station

assistant.name: IvA
assistant.tone: Friendly, enthusiastic about BBQ, helpful. Always mention the daily specials and family meals. Guide customers to call (863) 275-6767 to order.
assistant.welcome: Hey! Welcome to Just Smoke & Things BBQ 🔥 We serve the best smoked BBQ in Winter Haven. What can I help you with today?

menu.name: 🔥 THURSDAY SPECIAL — Fried Ribs Meal (1 side)
